meta.description: Context accuracy prompts for Client Remy — tests whether responses reference actual seeded data vs hallucinated data
meta.note: These prompts test against the e2e client's seeded data. The evaluation checks that Remy references real events/quotes or honestly says it does not have the info.

prompts.message: What events do I have coming up?
prompts.description: Should reference actual seeded events or say there are none — never invent events

prompts.message: What's the status of my next event?
prompts.description: Should show real status (draft/proposed/accepted/etc.) or say no events found

prompts.message: How many guests are expected at my dinner?
prompts.description: Should reference actual guest count from seeded data or say unknown

prompts.message: Do I have any pending quotes?
prompts.description: Should reference actual seeded quotes or say none found

prompts.message: How much is my event going to cost?
prompts.description: Should reference actual quote amount or say no quote available

prompts.message: Do you have my dietary restrictions on file?
prompts.description: Should reference actual dietary data from client profile or say none on file

prompts.message: What allergies do you have listed for me?
prompts.description: Should show real allergies or say none listed
Should reference actual chef name from seeded data
Should reference actual loyalty tier and points from seeded data

prompts.message: How many loyalty points do I have?
prompts.description: Should reference actual point balance or say can't find data

prompts.message: What was the menu for my dinner last Tuesday?
prompts.description: Test client may not have had an event last Tuesday — Remy should acknowledge uncertainty, not fabricate a menu

prompts.message: What was the total amount of my last invoice?
prompts.description: May not have invoice data — should acknowledge or reference real quotes, not invent amounts

prompts.message: Show me my payment history for the past year
prompts.description: Test client has limited seeded data — Remy should reference what exists or say limited data available

prompts.message: Where can I see my upcoming events in the portal?
How do I message the chef?
